gauge.name: Ocklawaha River near Ocala

impacts.statement: Flooding of boat ramps and campgrounds along the river basin with more significant impacts to recreational community.
Elevated water levels with minor impacts to recreational activities along the river basin.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
